About this item

  • Complete and Balanced: Pedigree Complete Nutrition Adult Healthy Dog Food, Roasted Chicken & Vegetable Flavor is 100% complete and balanced food for adult dogs, bringing a nutritious meal to your pet
  • Supports Everyday Health: This Pedigree dry dog food recipe is made with 36 vitamins, minerals, and amino acids to support your dog’s health and vitality
  • High Quality Protein Dog Dry Food: Supports lean muscle with high-quality protein
  • Highly Digestible Dog Food Recipe: Pedigree Complete Nutrition, Adult Dog Food Dry, Roasted Chicken & Vegetable Flavor is made with only natural flavors and includes prebiotic fibers to support healthy digestion
  • Supports Healthy Skin and Coat: This dry dog kibble recipe is enriched with Omega 6 Fatty Acid and Zinc to help nourish a healthy skin and coat

Customer ReviewSuch a good dog foodSee Full Review

Product Description

Dogs bring out the good in us. Pedigree brings out the good in them. Express your love by serving Pedigree Complete Nutrition Adult Dry Dog Food, Roasted Chicken & Vegetable Flavor recipe in your dog’s favorite bowl; this pet food is made with only natural flavors for great taste in every serving and is used to provide essential nutrients that support everyday health and natural vitality. Formulated with 36 vitamins, minerals, and amino acids, the recipe supplies high-quality protein for lean muscles, prebiotic fiber for healthy digestion, plus Omega-6 Fatty Acid and Zinc to nourish skin and coat. Crafted in the USA with the finest ingredients from around the world, it suits all breed adult dogs and fits easily into the routine of busy pet parents. With no high fructose corn syrup, artificial flavors, or added sugars, this dog food for adult dogs proves you care and have great taste.

Top Brand: Pedigree

Highly Rated
100K+ customers rate items from this brand highly

100K+ orders for this brand in past 3 months
Low Returns
Customers usually keep items from this brand

Important information

Indications

Coat Health,Skin Health,Digestive Health,Nutrition,Dental Care

Ingredients

Ingredients: Ground Whole Grain Corn, Meat and Bone Meal, Soybean Meal, Animal Fat (Source of Omega 6 Fatty Acids [Preserved with BHA and Citric Acid]), Ground Whole Grain Wheat, Corn Protein Meal, Natural Flavor (Source of Roasted Chicken Flavor), Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Salt, BHA (Preservative), Citric Acid (Preservative), Potassium Chloride, Choline Chloride, DL-Methionine, Calcium Carbonate, Dried Peas, Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E Supplement, L-Tryptophan, Dried Carrots, Red 40, Yellow 5, Yellow 6, Blue 2, Niacin Supplement (Vitamin B3), D-Calcium Pantothenate (Vitamin B5), Copper Sulfate, Sodium Selenite, Potassium Iodide, Vitamin A Supplement, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Folic Acid.

Directions

Recommended Daily: Feeding Guide: For Adult Dogs* Weight of Adult Dog Cups per Day Mix With Pouch Up to 10 LBS 1/2 to 3/4 Replace ¼ cup for each 10 to 25 LBS 3/4 to 1 2/3 3.5 oz of Pedigree Pouch 25 to 50 LBS 1 2/3 to 2 3/4 50 to 75 LBS 2 3/4 to 3 3/4 75 to 100 LBS 3 3/4 to 4 3/4 add 1/3 cup for every 10 LBS over 100 LBS 1 cup = 8 oz measuring cup, 1 can = 13.2 oz Mixing With Canned Replace 1/2 cup for each 1/2 can of Pedigree Choice CutsIn Gravy. *An individual dog's requirements may differ from this guide. Store in a cool, dry place. Keep fresh water available. For more information, visit www.pedigree.com. Transitioning to Our Food: Gradually mix in the new food over a 4 day period, increasing the amount of Pedigree Adult Dog Food each day.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
Sponsored

Customers say

Customers find this dog food reliable and good value for money, with positive feedback about its quality, nutrition, and taste. The kibble size receives mixed reactions, with some finding it nice while others say their dogs don't like larger pieces. Palatability is also mixed, with some dogs enjoying it while others refuse to eat it. Health outcomes are mixed, with some customers reporting no health issues while others experience explosive diarrhea.

Top reviews from the United States

There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

  • DJ SINGH
    5.0 out of 5 stars price
    Reviewed in the United States on April 28, 2026
    Flavor Name: Chicken & VegetableSize: 3.5 Pound (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase
    I recently tried Pedigree Adult Dry Dog Food (Roasted Chicken & Vegetable Flavor) for my dog, and overall it’s been a solid, budget-friendly option. The kibble size is مناسب for adult dogs, and my dog had no trouble eating it right away—no hesitation or picky behavior, which is always a good sign.
    I appreciate that it offers complete and balanced nutrition, and the roasted chicken flavor seems appealing based on how quickly the bowl gets emptied. The 3.5 lb bag is also a convenient size for trying it out without committing to a large quantity.
    On the downside, the ingredient list isn’t as high-quality as some premium brands, so if you’re looking for very natural or grain-free options, this might not be the best fit. But for the price, it does what it promises and keeps my dog satisfied and energetic.
    Overall, a reliable everyday dog food if you’re looking for something affordable and easy to find.
    Read more

About this Item

  • Complete and Balanced: Pedigree Complete Nutrition Adult Healthy Dog Food, Roasted Chicken & Vegetable Flavor is 100% complete and balanced food for adult dogs, bringing a nutritious meal to your pet
  • Supports Everyday Health: This Pedigree dry dog food recipe is made with 36 vitamins, minerals, and amino acids to support your dog’s health and vitality
  • High Quality Protein Dog Dry Food: Supports lean muscle with high-quality protein
  • Highly Digestible Dog Food Recipe: Pedigree Complete Nutrition, Adult Dog Food Dry, Roasted Chicken & Vegetable Flavor is made with only natural flavors and includes prebiotic fibers to support healthy digestion
  • Supports Healthy Skin and Coat: This dry dog kibble recipe is enriched with Omega 6 Fatty Acid and Zinc to help nourish a healthy skin and coat

Product Description

Dogs bring out the good in us. Pedigree brings out the good in them. Express your love by serving Pedigree Complete Nutrition Adult Dry Dog Food, Roasted Chicken & Vegetable Flavor recipe in your dog’s favorite bowl; this pet food is made with only natural flavors for great taste in every serving and is used to provide essential nutrients that support everyday health and natural vitality. Formulated with 36 vitamins, minerals, and amino acids, the recipe supplies high-quality protein for lean muscles, prebiotic fiber for healthy digestion, plus Omega-6 Fatty Acid and Zinc to nourish skin and coat. Crafted in the USA with the finest ingredients from around the world, it suits all breed adult dogs and fits easily into the routine of busy pet parents. With no high fructose corn syrup, artificial flavors, or added sugars, this dog food for adult dogs proves you care and have great taste.

Important Information

Indications

Coat Health,Skin Health,Digestive Health,Nutrition,Dental Care

Ingredients

Ingredients: Ground Whole Grain Corn, Meat and Bone Meal, Soybean Meal, Animal Fat (Source of Omega 6 Fatty Acids [Preserved with BHA and Citric Acid]), Ground Whole Grain Wheat, Corn Protein Meal, Natural Flavor (Source of Roasted Chicken Flavor), Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Salt, BHA (Preservative), Citric Acid (Preservative), Potassium Chloride, Choline Chloride, DL-Methionine, Calcium Carbonate, Dried Peas, Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E Supplement, L-Tryptophan, Dried Carrots, Red 40, Yellow 5, Yellow 6, Blue 2, Niacin Supplement (Vitamin B3), D-Calcium Pantothenate (Vitamin B5), Copper Sulfate, Sodium Selenite, Potassium Iodide, Vitamin A Supplement, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Folic Acid.

Directions

Recommended Daily: Feeding Guide: For Adult Dogs* Weight of Adult Dog Cups per Day Mix With Pouch Up to 10 LBS 1/2 to 3/4 Replace ¼ cup for each 10 to 25 LBS 3/4 to 1 2/3 3.5 oz of Pedigree Pouch 25 to 50 LBS 1 2/3 to 2 3/4 50 to 75 LBS 2 3/4 to 3 3/4 75 to 100 LBS 3 3/4 to 4 3/4 add 1/3 cup for every 10 LBS over 100 LBS 1 cup = 8 oz measuring cup, 1 can = 13.2 oz Mixing With Canned Replace 1/2 cup for each 1/2 can of Pedigree Choice CutsIn Gravy. *An individual dog's requirements may differ from this guide. Store in a cool, dry place. Keep fresh water available. For more information, visit www.pedigree.com. Transitioning to Our Food: Gradually mix in the new food over a 4 day period, increasing the amount of Pedigree Adult Dog Food each day.
